calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (935-937 Northpoint, San Francisco, Ca 94109)
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for and with Kathryn Barclay and Trina Glanville.

The sale was confirmed at $1,650,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 31, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (935-937 Northpoint, San Francisco, Ca 94109)
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Continued To Jul-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Kathryn Barclay (Administrator).

Ms. Ng requested a two week continuance for publication. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to July 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
